sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68384" key="molubdoth/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολυβδοτήξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n68384.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">melter of lead</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope> </bibl>: <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολιβδοτήξ</orth>, Hdn.Gr. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4093.tlg001:1:291" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Theod.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.291</biblScope> </bibl>: <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολιβδότηξ</orth>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. eund.ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
